steps.expression: async () => { const active = document.querySelector('button.tab-active'); if (!(active instanceof HTMLButtonElement)) { return null; } active.focus(); active.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'ArrowRight', bubbles: true, cancelable: true })); await new Promise((resolve) => window.setTimeout(resolve, 0)); const next = document.querySelector('button.tab-active'); return next instanceof HTMLButtonElement ? (next.textContent?.trim() ?? null) : null; }

async () => { const active = document.querySelector('button.tab-active'); if (!(active instanceof HTMLButtonElement)) { return null; } active.focus(); active.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'ArrowLeft', bubbles: true, cancelable: true })); await new Promise((resolve) => window.setTimeout(resolve, 0)); const next = document.querySelector('button.tab-active'); return next instanceof HTMLButtonElement ? (next.textContent?.trim() ?? null) : null; }

() => { const button = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.provider-card button')).find((node) => node.textContent?.trim() === 'Test connection'); return button instanceof HTMLButtonElement ? button.disabled : null; }

() => { const card = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.provider-card')).find((node) => node.textContent?.includes('OpenRouter')); if (!(card instanceof HTMLElement)) { return null; } const button = Array.from(card.querySelectorAll('button')).find((node) => node.textContent?.trim() === 'Test connection'); return button instanceof HTMLButtonElement ? button.disabled : null; }

steps.text: Title, Topic, and at least one Member are required before save.
